shows.name: Soul Proprietor
shows.desc: DJ Ratt🐀 Rockford continues our streak of early morning shows, this time with music and words to heal the soul, and get you through the week.

shows.name: Brick City Jungle
shows.desc: CRUISE ! Brick City Jungle is a breakneck ride through jungle, breakcore, house; anything that gets you moving, from the 90s to the present.

shows.name: Too Much Information
shows.desc: It's learning time. DJ Wikiediea selects a guest every week to learn about anything at all, be it the solo careers of Star Trek actors or Dolly Parton. Because what's more fun than learning whatever you're supposed to be learning? Learning obscure trivia about hyperspecific genres of information.

shows.name: Pat's Crap 3 Part 2: The Extended Edition
shows.desc: Pat's got a gift for the talk show, putting on a wild ride as he talks through whatever's on his mind, with just the right amount of music breaks to keep the energy up.

shows.name: A Couple of Loose Screws
shows.desc: A show made by people who love racing and cars, and made for people who love racing and cars.
